emails.subject: Re: deal 557724
emails.body: Re: deal 557724 It's changed to APS. I'm wondering about the status of APS and Pinnacle I guess the traders here had heard we were now doing our trades with Pinnacle, not APS. Is this incorrect? Do you know who might know about that? Thanks, kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/22/2001 12:13 PM
